name: Instamojo India SMB Payment and Commerce API
what_it_does: Instamojo India SMB payment gateway and digital commerce REST API for Indian small businesses, freelancers, and creators to accept UPI, cards, net banking, and EMI payments through payment links, online stores, and checkout integration without technical complexity. Enables AI agents to manage payment link creation for India no-code payment automation, handle payment request collection via SMS and email for India outreach payment automation, access online store management for India D2C digital commerce automation, retrieve payment status and confirmation for India order fulfillment automation, manage refund processing for India order management automation, handle smart links for India gated content and digital product automation, access payout processing for India marketplace disbursement automation, retrieve transaction reporting for India financial reconciliation automation, manage EMI and BNPL configuration for India installment commerce automation, and integrate Instamojo with Indian e-commerce, freelancer, and creator economy platforms for end-to-end India SMB payment automation.
use_cases: Creating payment links from India freelancer and creator payment agents
Collecting online course payments from India edtech commerce agents
Managing D2C digital product sales from India solopreneur agents
Processing UPI and card payments from India SMB checkout agents
not_for: Enterprise-scale India payments (use Razorpay or Cashfree for enterprise API)
Complex marketplace payments with split at scale (use Razorpay Route for enterprise split)
International payment acceptance beyond India (use Stripe for global)
best_when: An Indian freelancer, creator, or SMB wanting AI agents to automate payment link creation, UPI/card collection, digital product sales, and basic payment reporting through Instamojo's SMB-friendly platform.
avoid_when: RBI PAYMENT AGGREGATOR COMPLIANCE: Instamojo operates under RBI payment aggregator guidelines; automated payment operations must comply with RBI KYC and transaction limits; automated high-value payment without KYC-verified merchant creates transaction rejection. PAYMENT LINK vs API CHECKOUT CAPABILITY: Instamojo is primarily a payment link and hosted checkout platform; direct API-based card charging (server-to-server) has limited support; automated payment expecting full S2S card API may find Instamojo redirect-based checkout required. SETTLEMENT TIMING FOR CASH FLOW: Instamojo settles payments with 3-5 business day delay; automated cash flow dependent on same-day settlement must use Instamojo Smart Links or upgrade plan; automated immediate disbursement assumption creates treasury timing mismatch. DIGITAL PRODUCT DELIVERY AUTOMATION: Instamojo Smart Links for digital products require product upload in Instamojo dashboard; automated digital delivery depends on pre-uploaded product configuration; automated on-demand digital product creation via API alone creates limited content management capability.

auth.notes: Instamojo uses API key and Auth token (OAuth-based) for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Bengaluru, India HQ. Founded 2012 by Sampad Swain, Akash Gehani, and Aditya Sengupta. Backed by Kalaari Capital, 500 Startups, Blume Ventures ($12M raised). Products: Payment links, online store, smart links, payment gateway, payouts. SDKs: Python, PHP, Ruby, Node.js. PCI DSS. RBI-regulated. 1M+ Indian SMBs. Competes with Razorpay and PayU for India SMB payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for payment links (2% transaction fee); store available with transaction fees
pricing.paid_tiers: Payment Gateway: 2% per transaction; Pro plans with lower rates at volume
pricing.notes: Bengaluru IN. Kalaari Capital backed. Per-transaction fees in INR. Free account available with transaction fee.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment request and reporting APIs throttled; webhooks for payment and refund events

known_agent_gotchas: PAYMENT REQUEST vs PAYMENT LINK DISTINCTION: Instamojo has Payment Requests (API-created, customer-specific) and Payment Links (dashboard links, reusable); automated payment must use Payment Request API for individual payment collection; automated reuse of Payment Link URL for different customers creates payment attribution to wrong customer

WEBHOOK SIGNATURE MISSING: Instamojo webhooks do not include cryptographic signature; automated webhook processing should verify source IP or implement order-amount cross-validation; automated unvalidated webhook creates spoofed payment notification vulnerability

PAYMENT EXPIRY CONFIGURATION: Instamojo Payment Requests have configurable expiry (default 2 hours); automated payment link distribution via email/SMS must account for expiry; automated long-duration payment campaigns must set expiry to match campaign duration

TWO-API-VERSION ENVIRONMENT: Instamojo v1 and v2 APIs coexist with different endpoints; automated integration must consistently use v2 API; automated v1 API use creates deprecated endpoint warnings and limited feature access

ALLOW_REPEATED_PAYMENTS FOR MULTI-USE LINKS: By default Instamojo payment requests are single-use; automated reusable collection link must set allow_repeated_payments=True; automated single-use link distribution for recurring collection creates link expired error on second payment
agent_readiness.security_notes: India SMB payments. PCI-DSS, RBI-regulated. API key/token. IN. Payment and store data.

security_score_components.security_notes: India SMB payments. PCI-DSS. API key. IN. Payment data.
